results.description: വിവിധ തലങ്ങളിലുള്ള കേന്ദ്രീകൃത ക്ഷേമ പദ്ധതികളുടെ നടത്തിപ്പും അവയുടെ ഫലപ്രാപ്‌തിയും കമ്മിറ്റി പരിശോധിക്കും.

results.title: Govt Issues Notice to Meta to Explain Security Risks as It Stalls WhatsApp Username Rollout
results.description: The tech giant has been given a strict deadline of three days to respond to these regulatory inquiries.

Presidency clears Gbajabiamila, exposes alleged fake presidential council scam
results.description: The Presidency has dismissed claims linking the Chief of Staff to the President, Femi Gbajabiamila, to the appointment of Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi Matthew, describing the allegations as false and insisting that the suspect operated a fictitious presidential agency using forged documents.
